site.title: Themadhood Media
site.tagline: Creative production across music, video, photography, and digital media.
site.metaDescription: Themadhood Media is the media division within Themadhood, overseeing music, video, photography, and related creative releases.

footer.title: Themadhood Media
footer.line2: Themadhood Media operates as a parent entity for affiliated projects.

hero.headline: Themadhood Media
body: Themadhood Media is the creative media division within the broader Themadhood ecosystem.
It exists to develop, organize, and release creative works across multiple media disciplines while keeping branch structure clean and consistent.

about.title: ABOUT US
body: As a parent entity, Themadhood Media oversees media-focused branches such as music, video, and photography.
When a media branch does not maintain its own public presence, releases, updates, and creative direction route through Themadhood Media.

items.title: Themadhood's Music
items.body: Original music and audio works created under the Themadhood ecosystem, including standalone releases, sound design, and project-specific compositions.

items.title: Themadhood's Videos
items.body: Original video and motion content, including short-form media, long-form projects, and experimental visuals. Publishing details are handled at the branch level.

items.title: Themadhood's Photos
items.body: Photography and visual imagery, including digital collections, project documentation, and curated sets. Presentation and usage details are handled at the branch level.

items.title: Other/ Routed Through Us
items.body: Requests that don’t clearly fall under a specific media branch, including custom, experimental, or cross-disciplinary work.

contact.title: CONNECT WITH US
contact.note: GitHub Pages is static-only. If you want submissions, wire this up to Formspree/Netlify Forms later.
